dict.string: PageFly Capture reads the focused app, window title, and visible text via macOS Accessibility to build your personal work log. Password fields are always skipped.
PageFly Capture uses your microphone only when you start a recording, to capture your voice during meetings for later transcription on your server.

PageFly Capture uses screen capture for two opt-in features: (1) system-audio tap via ScreenCaptureKit while recording a meeting, (2) the "OCR this window" button, which takes a single screenshot of the currently focused window and runs local on-device text recognition to rescue content from AX-blind apps (WeChat, Feishu, etc.). Both are user-triggered — no automatic screenshots.
